_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: The August 2024 analog plus institutional ETF inflows against extreme fear suggests the ladder leg is rising from Complacency toward Hope as smart money accumulates while sentiment remains suppressed.
next_move.brains_agree: Yes — both brains are structurally LONG and expect an upward move; they differ only on current phase labeling, not direction.
